RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT NICO MARTIN PRESENTS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA NICO MARTIN PRESENTS MARTIN, NICO AKA NICOLAS MARTIN, INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA NICO MARTIN PRESENTS

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF BIRITE RESTAURANT SUPPLY INC.'S APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER OF WRIT OF ATTACHMENT IS GRANTED, IN PART, AS TO DEFENDANT NICO MARTIN PRESENTS, INC. DBA NICO MARTIN PRESENTS, AND DENIED AS TO DEFENDANT NICO MARTIN AKA NICOLAS MARTIN, INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA NICO MARTIN PRESENTS. ATTACHMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $ 4,992.49 SHALL ISSUE AGAINST DEFENDANT NICO MARTIN PRESENTS, INC. DBA NICO MARTIN PRESENTS. BEFORE THE ISSUANCE OF THE WRIT OF ATTACHMENT, PLAINTIFF BIRITE RESTAURANT SUPPLY, INC. SHALL FILE AN UNDERTAKING OF $ 10,000.00. (CCP 489.210, 489.220.) PLAINTIFF BIRITE RETAURANT SUPPLY, INC. APPLIES FOR A WRIT OF ATTACHMENT AGAINST DEFENDANTS NICO MARTIN PRESENTS, INC. DBA NICO MARTIN PRESENTS (COLLECTIVELY "NICO MARTIN PRESENTS") AND NICO MARTIN AKA NICOLAS MARTIN, INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA NICO MARTIN PRESENTS (COLLECTIVELY "MR. MARTIN"). (APPLICATION, 2.) PLAINTIFF HAS ESTABLISHED THE PROBABLE VALIDITY OF ITS CLAIM AGAINST NICO MARTIN PRESENTS AND THAT THE SUM IS A FIXED AND ASCERTAINABLE AMOUNT OF 4,992.49. (NEWELL DECL., 4, EXHIBIT A.) PLAINTIFF HAS NOT ESTABLISHED THE PROBABLE VALIDITY OF ITS CLAIM AGAINST MR. MARTIN. (CCP 484.090.) THE OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT IDENTIFIES THE ACCOUNT HOLDER AS "NICO MARTIN PRESENTS", AND NOT MR. MARTIN. (NEWELL DECL., EXHIBIT A.) PLAINTIFF HAS NOT PRESENTED SUFFICIENT EVIDENCE TO DEMONSTRATE THAT MR. MARTIN DOES BUSINESS AS NICO MARTIN PRESENTS. IN THE COMPLAINT, PLAINTIFF ALLEGES THAT MR. MARTIN SIGNED A PERSONAL GUARANTY. (COMPLAINT, 14, EXHIBIT B.) HOWEVER, THE COMPLAINT IS NOT VERIFIED AS AVERRED IN THE APPLICATION. (COMPARE COMPLAINT; WITH APPLICATION, 7A, COOK DECL., P. 1:10-11.) (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, COURT REPORTER: TONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-28-2014 Off Calendar

Notice Of Applicaiton Andhearing For Right To Attach Order Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Dec-19-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF BIRITE RESTAURANT SUPPLY INC.'S ApplicaTIon And Hearing For Right To Attach Order Of Writ Of Attachment IS Granted, in part, as to Defendant Nico Martin Presents, Inc. dba Nico Martin Presents, and denied as to Defendant Nico Martin aka Nicolas Martin, individually and dba Nico Martin Presents. Attachment in the amount of $ 4,992.49 shall issue against Defendant Nico Martin Presents, Inc. dba Nico Martin Presents. Before the issuance of the writ of attachment, Plaintiff BiRite Restaurant Supply, Inc. shall file an undertaking of $ 10,000.00. (CCP 489.210, 489.220.) Plaintiff BiRite Retaurant Supply, Inc. applies for a writ of attachment against Defendants Nico Martin Presents, Inc. dba Nico Martin Presents (collectively "Nico Martin Presents") and Nico Martin aka Nicolas Martin, individually and dba Nico Martin Presents (collectively "Mr. Martin"). (Application, 2.) Plaintiff has established the probable validity of its claim against Nico Martin Presents and that the sum is a fixed and ascertainable amount of 4,992.49. (Newell Decl., 4, Exhibit A.) Plaintiff has not established the probable validity of its claim against Mr. Martin. (CCP 484.090.) The open book account identifies the account holder as "Nico Martin Presents", and not Mr. Martin. (Newell Decl., Exhibit A.) Plaintiff has not presented sufficient evidence to demonstrate that Mr. Martin does business as Nico Martin Presents. In the Complaint, Plaintiff alleges that Mr. Martin signed a personal guaranty. (Complaint, 14, Exhibit B.) However, the Complaint is not verified as averred in the Application. (Compare Complaint; with Application, 7a, Cook Decl., p. 1:10-11.) (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Tony Vaughn, CSR #6185
